LanguageData.VQE_TurretDrone.label: turret drone
LanguageData.VQE_TurretDrone.description: An automated military drone designed for static defense. It is equipped with a twin-barrel turret mounted on a heavily armored, treaded platform. Though slow, it can reposition itself when needed.\n\nDrones have a limited lifespan and will begin malfunctioning as they near end-of-life, but can use standby mode to slow component degradation. They require connection to a powered drone transmitter to function.
LanguageData.VQE_TurretDrone.tools.0.label: shell spike
